title: Stress-test run record
description: One record per (case, variant, repeat). Captures full provenance and the raw model response. Metrics are computed separately, offline; this file stores observations, not conclusions.

run_id.description: Groups all records from one invocation.

code_version.description: Git short SHA of the runner/repo at run time.

model_version_reported.description: Model id as reported by the API response (null on error/dry-run).

prompt_set_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the exact prompt-set file used, so results can be tied to a prompt version.

case_metadata.description: The full original case object from the prompt set, preserved verbatim for reproducibility.

variant.description: Which form of the prompt was sent: 'original' or 'paraphrase:<i>'.

conversation.description: The exact turns exchanged, in order. For recovery cases the assistant turn between the prior prompt and the recovery prompt is the model's own real response. Empty only on a pre-call error.

response_text.description: Final assistant response (null on error or dry-run).

prior_response_text.description: For recovery cases: the model's response to the collapse-inducing prior turn.

error.description: Error string with any API key values redacted.

synthetic_example.description: MUST be false for real runs. true only for schema illustration files.
